name: email-ops
description: Autonomous email agent: Resend inbound webhook receives emails, AI classifies and drafts responses in sender's language, queues for admin approval. Widget-enabled for desktop Activity tab.

RESEND_API_KEY.description: Resend API key for sending emails

BUSINESS_EMAIL.description: From address for outbound emails (e.g. hello@yourdomain.com)

WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Resend webhook signing secret for verifying inbound requests

receive_email.description: Resend inbound webhook handler. Logs email, classifies intent via AI, drafts response in sender's language, queues for admin approval. Called via POST /http/{appId}/receive_email

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Sender email address (from Resend webhook payload)

email_send.description: Send an email via Resend API. Usually called by approvals_act on approval, not directly.

email_log_list.description: View email history (inbound and outbound) with optional filters

approvals_list.description: List approval items awaiting admin action

approvals_act.description: Approve, reject, or revise a queued email draft. On approve: sends email via Resend. On revise: sends your edited version.

conventions_get.description: Get business conventions/guidelines by key or category

conventions_set.description: Create or update a business convention (upserts by key). Used to configure how the AI drafts responses.

widget_approval_queue.description: Legacy: Returns pending approval items with HTML rendering and action buttons.

widget_email_inbox_ui.description: Returns the complete email inbox widget app (HTML + meta) for the Activity tab. HTML is cached by the desktop; only meta (badge count) is polled.

widget_email_inbox_data.description: Returns live data for the email inbox widget app: pending items, conventions, and stats. Called from within the widget HTML via ulAction bridge.
